Errors.networkError: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
Errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
Errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
Errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Wait a few minutes before trying again.

boundary.title: Something broke
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.

notFoundPage.title: Page not found
notFoundPage.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

search.label: Search
search.description: Find jobs by keyword, location, or source

fallback.label: Jobs Finder
fallback.description: Smart job discovery across LinkedIn, Indeed, and InfoJobs

forgotPassword.title: Recover your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If the address is registered, you'll receive a password reset link in the next few minutes.

resetPassword.invalidLinkTitle: The link is invalid or has expired
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: For security, recovery links expire after a while. Request a new one.
resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Rotate your password without signing out.
changePassword.oauthToast: You signed in with an external provider. You don't have a password to change.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.destructiveHelp: Your account, CV, and all associated data will be deleted. This action is irreversible.
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: This action is permanent. Your CV, favorites, and all associated data will be erased.
deleteAccount.errorToast: We couldn't delete your account. Try again or contact support.

emailVerification.title: Verify your email
emailVerification.description: We sent you a verification link. Confirm it to access all features.
emailVerification.resendErrorToast: We couldn't resend the email. Try again in a few minutes.

magicLink.title: Magic link
magicLink.subtitle: We'll send you a link to sign in without a password.
magicLink.successDescription: We sent you a link to sign in. Open it from this browser.

globalSignOut.tooltip: We'll sign you out from other devices. Existing sessions may take up to 1 hour to expire.
globalSignOut.confirmDescription: We'll sign out your active session on this browser and revoke sessions on other devices. You'll need to sign in again.
globalSignOut.errorToast: We couldn't sign out your sessions. Try again.

toast.networkError: We couldn't send the email. Try again.
toast.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes before trying again.

Validation.passwordMustDiffer: New password must be different from the current one
Validation.deleteEmailMismatch: Type your exact email to confirm

totalJobs.label: Total in database
totalJobs.plural: {count, plural, =0 {No jobs} one {# job} other {# jobs}}

newJobs.label: Today's jobs
newJobs.plural: {count, plural, =0 {No jobs today} one {# job today} other {# jobs today}}

openedJobs.label: Clicked jobs
openedJobs.plural: {count, plural, =0 {No clicks yet} one {# clicked job} other {# clicked jobs}}

cvsAdapted.label: Adapted CVs
cvsAdapted.plural: {count, plural, =0 {No CVs yet} one {# adapted CV} other {# adapted CVs}}

favorites.label: Favorites
favorites.plural: {count, plural, =0 {No favorites yet} one {# favorite} other {# favorites}}

Jobs.count: {count, plural, =0 {No jobs} one {# job} other {# jobs}}
Jobs.applicants: {count, plural, =0 {No applicants} one {# applicant} other {# applicants}}

modal.consent: I'll use this CV to generate an adapted version for this job.
modal.title: Generate adapted CV

Search.results: {count, plural, =0 {No results} one {# result} other {# results}}

Favorites.heading: Favorite jobs
Favorites.count: {count, plural, =0 {No saved favorites} one {# saved favorite} other {# saved favorites}}

emptyState.title: No favorites yet
emptyState.description: Save jobs from the search results to revisit them later.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emailDescription: Receive updates about new jobs and account changes.
notifications.pushDescription: Get notified in your browser when new jobs arrive.
notifications.weeklyDescription: A summary of new jobs posted this week.

input.placeholder: Ask about jobs, e.g. "remote React roles in Madrid"

errors.streamFailed: The chat stream failed. Please try again.
errors.connectionFailed: Could not connect to the chat service.
errors.generic: The chat assistant is unavailable right now.
errors.rateLimit: Too many chat requests. Wait a moment and try again.

Jobs.errors.loadFailed: Could not load jobs. Please try again.

hero.title: Find your next job in minutes, not weeks
hero.subtitle: Jobs Finder searches LinkedIn, Indeed, and InfoJobs in parallel so you see every opportunity the moment it appears.

features.title: Everything you need to land your next role
features.subtitle: Stop juggling tabs. Stop missing postings. Get hired faster.

search.title: Unified search
search.description: One query, three platforms, zero duplicates. Smart deduplication keeps the list clean.

matches.title: AI-matched
matches.description: We learn what you want and surface the best roles first.

save.title: Save & organize
save.description: Bookmark jobs, add notes, and track your application status.

apply.title: One-click apply
apply.description: Open the original posting on the source site in a single click.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.description: Your data stays yours. We never sell your job search activity.

offline.title: Offline-first
offline.description: Browse your saved jobs even without an internet connection.

step1.title: Upload your CV
step1.description: PDF or paste. We auto-detect your skills, experience, and preferences.

step2.title: Search & filter
step2.description: Find roles by keyword, location, salary, contract type, and source.

step3.title: Apply in one click
step3.description: Open the posting on the source site and submit your application.

cta.title: Ready to find your next role?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of job seekers who stopped searching and started getting interviews.

upload.title: Upload your CV (PDF)
upload.mustSignIn: Sign in to upload your CV
